funny.prompt: A cat sitting on a pile of important documents and grooming while the human tries to extract them, static overhead shot, desk lamp light, bureaucratic obstruction, paper rustling and frustrated muttering beneath a serene purr

A cat in tiny judge's wig staring at a spilled plant pot, serious overhead close-up, neutral courtroom light, righteous judgment energy, authoritative gavel bangs as cat gestures accusingly at the scattered dirt

A cat finding a single sunbeam in an otherwise dark room and sitting precisely in its center with a beatific expression, overhead slow tilt shot, dramatic single light shaft, chosen by the sun, swelling choir music with warmth-shimmer sounds
A cat catching a fly in the air and looking genuinely shocked it worked, close-up reaction shot, window light, unexpected competence, surprise game show fanfare

A cat pressing its face completely flat against a window and staring at the mailman with maximum intensity, exterior close-up through glass showing flattened face, bright midday sun, glass provides no protection for the mailman emotionally, dramatic surveillance thriller music
A cat staring into the open refrigerator for 45 seconds and then walking away, wide kitchen shot, cold fridge light spill, refrigerator door ajar, sad contemplative saxophone solo

A cat bolting out of a room at the sound of a sneeze, wide shot with fast exit blur, living room lighting, overreaction at maximum, startling sneeze followed by thundering gallop receding into silence

A cat staring intently at the corner of the ceiling while a human tries to sleep, night vision green tint, darkened bedroom, supernatural implications, creepy ambient drone as the human slowly sits up in terror

cute.prompt: A fluffy kitten with a crinkled whisker pressing its forehead into an owner's chin, extreme close-up, warm soft lamplight, total trust and tenderness, purring and a slow reverent piano chord progression
